title: ophrys scolopax var. bicornis
intro: Ophrys scolopax var. bicornis, also known as the bee orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Ophrys genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ophrys scolopax var. bicornis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and availability may vary depending on the region and local regulations.
